meta.intent: Combine rescue order choice with blocker choice by making the lower puppy urgent but gated by ice while the upper puppy sits behind a cleaner crate route.
meta.expectedPath: Open the lower puppy through the left-side ice first, then pivot to the top crate pocket once the urgent rescue is secured.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player spends too many early actions on the tidier upper crate side because it looks faster, then loses tempo on the lower rescue.
meta.whatItProves: Rescue order survives once the board gets slightly messier.
meta.notes: The rebuilt board keeps the lower mixed-blocker route as the generous intended line while the denser top crate pocket remains a cleaner-looking but slower temptation.
